title: buddleja curviflora var. venenifera
intro: Buddleja curviflora var. venenifera, also known as the 'poison butterfly bush', is a plant species within the Buddleja genus that is native to southern Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a cardiotonic, meaning it can help regulate heartbeat and blood pressure. The health benefits of Buddleja curviflora var. venenifera include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal use, although its preparation and usage should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
